backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing formation order management, user profiles, and access control with admin/user permissions for order submission and retrieval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including services pages, catalog expansion, detailed service pages, home page updates, and service comparison functionality.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and features for the UK company formation application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components, charts, and sidebar elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags, favicon, Inter font preload, and root div for React application mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with TanStack Router configuration defining all routes including home, pricing, services, admin pages, and legal pages.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Site layout component with header navigation including Services dropdown, mobile menu, authentication controls, admin links, and footer with social links and service categories.
frontend/src/components/Section.tsx: Reusable section wrapper component providing consistent padding and container width styling for page sections.
frontend/src/components/services/Service: Displays a responsive comparison table of three company formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with features and pricing. Allows users to select a package, updates the formation draft, and navigates to the formation wizard.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/fo: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the formation wizard data model including Director, Shareholder, PSC, and FormationDraft types. Exports a defaultFormationDraft object with initial empty/default values for all form fields.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/st: Form step component for collecting company name preferences (up to 3 choices) and company type selection. Displays validation errors and provides guidance text for users.
Form step component for collecting contact information including full name, email address, and phone number. Displays validation errors and explains how contact details will be used.

Form step component for managing company directors with add/remove functionality. Collects personal details including name, date of birth, nationality, occupation, and address for each director with validation.

Form step component for managing Persons with Significant Control (PSC) with add/remove functionality. Collects personal details and nature of control checkboxes (shares, voting rights, appointments, influence) for each PSC.
Form step component for selecting registered office address option (own address or service) and collecting address details. Conditionally displays address input fields based on the selected option.

Displays a comprehensive review screen showing all formation draft details including selected package, company details, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSCs, SIC codes, and contact information before final submission.

Manages shareholder information collection with inputs for total shares, share capital, and individual shareholder details including name, share allocation, and share class with validation for total share allocation.
Allows users to add up to 4 SIC codes describing business activities, with manual input and quick-add buttons for common codes like software development, financial management, and retail.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/su: Converts formation draft to order input format, and manages order confirmation storage/retrieval in sessionStorage including orderId, company name, package details, and timestamp.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/us: Custom React hook that manages formation draft state with sessionStorage persistence, providing updateDraft and clearDraft functions.
frontend/src/features/formationWizard/va: Provides validation functions for each wizard step (company basics, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSCs, SIC codes, contact) returning ValidationErrors objects with field-specific error messages.
frontend/src/features/packages/packagesC: Defines Package interface and exports three formation packages (Basic £49, Standard £99, Premium £199) with their features, descriptions, and pricing.
frontend/src/features/services/servicesC: Defines the Service interface and exports a catalog of UK company formation services including limited company formation, LLP formation, registered office addresses, mail forwarding, company secretary, and nominee director services with pricing and features.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated or anonymous actor instance for backend communication, using Internet Identity and React Query with automatic query invalidation on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options for ICP-based authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for backend operations including user profile management, formation order submission and retrieval, user role checking, and admin verification using the actor instance.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a professional UK corporate theme using forest green and charcoal colors for both light and dark modes, including sidebar and chart color schemes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminExportPage: Admin-only page that displays project structure information and export instructions, with authentication and authorization checks to ensure only logged-in administrators can access it.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrderDetai: Admin page displaying detailed information for a specific order including customer details, company information, and parsed additional details from JSON, with authentication checks and navigation back to orders list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminOrdersPage: Admin dashboard page showing a table of all company formation orders with customer name, business name, formation type, and actions to view individual order details, protected by authentication checks.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page component displaying a contact form with name, email, phone, subject, and message fields, along with company contact information including email, phone, address, and business hours.
frontend/src/pages/FaqPage.tsx: Renders an FAQ page with an accordion component displaying common questions about UK company formation, including topics like formation time, registered office addresses, directors, shareholders, PSC, SIC codes, and package differences.
frontend/src/pages/FormationWizardPage.t: Implements a multi-step wizard for company formation with 8 steps (company basics, registered office, directors, shareholders, PSC, SIC codes, contact, review), including validation, navigation, draft persistence, and final submission to the backend API.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page showcasing UK company formation services with hero section, benefits, core services (formation, registered office, business support, compliance), and a 4-step process overview with CTAs to start formation or view pricing.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Explains the UK company formation process in detail with sections for the 6-step formation process, requirements checklist, and timeline showing progression from immediate submission to completion within 24-48 hours.
frontend/src/pages/legal/PrivacyPolicyPa: Static page displaying the privacy policy with sections covering information collection, usage, sharing, security, user rights, and contact information in a prose-styled layout.
frontend/src/pages/legal/TermsOfServiceP: Static page displaying terms of service with sections on agreement, services, responsibilities, fees, processing times, liability, intellectual property, and governing law in a prose-styled layout.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmationPage: Displays order confirmation after successful formation application submission, showing order ID, company name, package details, submission timestamp, and next steps; loads confirmation data from local storage.
frontend/src/pages/PricingPage.tsx: Presents three formation packages (Basic, Standard, Premium) with pricing, features, and selection functionality that updates the draft state and navigates to the formation wizard.
frontend/src/pages/services/BusinessSupp: Service landing page for business support and compliance services, displaying benefits, support services, and compliance services with hero section and CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/services/CompanyForma: Service landing page for company formation services, featuring benefits, package comparison table, and formation types with CTAs to start formation wizard.
frontend/src/pages/services/RegisteredOf: Service landing page for registered office and business address services, showcasing benefits and available office services with hero section.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: Displays a hero section and grid of service categories (company formation, registered office, business support, compliance) with cards showing available services in each category and links to detailed service pages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, extended utilities, typography plugin, container queries, and custom animations.
project_state.json: Project state file defining a company formations service website with 6 implemented features including services pages, catalog expansion, detailed service pages, home page updates, service comparison, and enhanced navigation. Specifies required service category icons and hero banner images in forest green branding.
